refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined productivity target by optimizing equipment operation, task scheduling, and resource utilization.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and high-level; decomposing it into sub-FRs focused on key productivity drivers (equipment operation, task scheduling, resource utilization) allows targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure productivity metrics (m³/h or ton/h) during representative operations and verify that each sub-FR contributes to meeting or exceeding the productivity target.
sub_frs: FR2: Optimize task scheduling and coordination

candidate_dps: DP1: Advanced vehicle control algorithms for operation efficiency
DP2: Teleoperation and autonomous task scheduling system
DP3: Integrated resource monitoring and allocation system
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Advanced vehicle control algorithms for operation efficiency

potential_sources: Interaction between vehicle control and teleoperation modules
Coordination between task scheduling and resource utilization
coupling_check.notes: DP1 is logically decoupled from DP2 and DP3 at this level; interfaces are well-defined and manageable.

assumptions_risks: Assumes vehicle control algorithms can be effectively integrated with teleoperation and resource systems.
Risk that poor coordination between modules could degrade productivity.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider refining DP2 and DP3 in subsequent levels to ensure clear interface definitions and minimize coupling.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical and software components responsible for vehicle operation and control.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle control module sends operational data to NGHE Solution and Safety Services.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives task commands from Teleoperation and NGHE Solution.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Communication channel for control commands and status updates.

module_containment_scores.notes: Vehicle control logic partially contained but heavily diffused across NGHE Solution.
Vehicle module has high containment of control algorithms with minimal diffusion.
Minimal containment; mostly interfaces and command relay.
No containment of vehicle control logic.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Vehicle module is the best architectural boundary for implementing advanced vehicle control algorithms to maximize containment and minimize diffusion.
containment_risks: Potential interface complexity with Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules.
Risk of duplicated control logic if interfaces are not well managed.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Ensure strict interface definitions and ownership agreements to prevent diffusion and duplication.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (advanced vehicle control algorithms) logically satisfies the refined FR (optimize equipment operation efficiency) with clear mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Possible diffusion of control logic if interfaces with Teleoperation and NGHE Solution are not tightly controlled.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment scores, indicating good architectural packaging for the DP.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by measuring vehicle operational efficiency and telemetry data during representative operations.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of vehicle control DP to Vehicle IM with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Refine interface definitions between Vehicle and Teleoperation modules to reduce diffusion risk.
Plan subsequent decomposition of task scheduling and resource utilization FRs and DPs.

decision.justification: While the current decomposition and assignments are sound, further refinement of the other sub-FRs (task scheduling and resource utilization) and their corresponding DPs and IMs is needed to complete the productivity KPI coverage.
next_level_sub_frs: FR2: Optimize task scheduling and coordination

revise.why: To decompose and define DPs and IMs for the remaining sub-FRs to ensure full coverage of the productivity KPI.

assumptions: Vehicle control algorithms can be effectively modularized within the Vehicle IM.
Interfaces with Teleoperation and NGHE Solution are stable and well-defined.
open_risks: Potential diffusion of control logic across modules.
Incomplete coverage of productivity KPI until all sub-FRs are decomposed.
evidence_needed: Performance data from vehicle control during representative operations.
Interface stability and integration test results.
